sz-stay.commute: From HKG airport, the SkyPier ferry runs straight to Shekou Cruise Center (~30 min, ~HKD 299 / ¥280), and you stay airside with no HK immigration (luggage through-checked), then ~5 min taxi to the apartment. 11 sailings/day. HKG→Shekou: 08:15, 09:45, 11:00, 13:00, 15:00, 16:00, 17:00, 18:00, 19:00, 20:00, 21:15. Shekou→HKG: 07:15, 08:45, 10:00, 12:00, 14:00, 15:00, 16:00, 17:00, 18:00, 19:00, 20:15. Buy ≥60 min before sailing; for an onward HK flight allow ~3 h. Verify times on cmskchp.com (holidays vary). Alternative: high-speed rail HK West Kowloon → Futian (~14 min), then Metro Line 2/12 to Sea World.

sz-gba.commute: One transfer: Line 12 to 灵芝, change Line 5 to 宝华, ~40 min. DiDi ~12 km, 22-26 min, ¥40-50. Recommend DiDi.

sz-scitech.commute: Metro ~105 min (Line 2 → 4 at 市民中心 → 6 at 红山, to 光明, skybridge into the museum). DiDi ~45 min, ¥115. Metro lands you right at the door.

sz-nathist.commute: Transit ~100-110 min: Line 2 to Gangxia North, change to Line 14 express to Pingshan, then Line 16/bus. DiDi ~55 km, 60-75 min, ¥150-180. A car is better with company.

sz-seg.commute: Metro ~55 min: Line 2 direct (Sea World) → 华强北 (exit A, into Huaqiangbei). DiDi ~40 min, ¥70. One-seat, no transfer, take the metro.

sz-k33.commute: Metro ~120 min (Line 2 → 4 → 6 to 光明大街) + taxi ¥15 or bus M451. DiDi ~50 min, ¥125. Recommend DiDi.

sz-nick.commute: One transfer: Line 12 to 南油, change Line 9 to 深圳湾公园 (exit E, 5 min walk), ~33 min. DiDi ~8 km, 15-18 min, ¥25-32. Recommend DiDi.

hk-uniqlo-utme.commute: Ferry is best: 5 min to Shekou Cruise Center, clear immigration, ~30 min ferry to TST, then MTR Tsuen Wan line to Admiralty + Island line to Causeway Bay; ~2h. The Shenzhen Bay Port land route is slower (~2.5h).

sz-wanda-longgang.commute: Metro ~95 min (Line 12 → Line 10 at 岗厦北, to 木古) + 8 min walk. DiDi ~50 min, ¥120. Recommend DiDi off-peak.

sz-huafa-snow-world.commute: Metro ~90 min, no transfer: Line 12 direct from Sea World to 海上田园南 + 8 min walk. DiDi ~50 min, ¥115. Recommend DiDi. (Site is in Shajing/Bao'an.)

sz-wondermeet.commute: Metro ~55 min: Line 2 → Line 1 at 世界之窗 → 华强路, 166 m to 世纪汇. DiDi ~35 min, ¥70. Comparable; DiDi if traffic is light.

sz-kpfun.commute: One transfer: Line 12 to 南油, change Line 9 to 下沙, ~32 min. DiDi ~10 km, 18-22 min, ¥32-40. Recommend DiDi.

sz-michelin-hunan.commute: ~6 min walk, in the Sea World plaza.

sz-chiikawa.commute: One transfer: Line 12 to 灵芝, change Line 5 to 宝安中心, ~38 min. DiDi ~11 km, 20-25 min, ¥38-48. Recommend DiDi.

sz-shiopon.commute: Line 2 from Sea World to 登良, ~10 min, then a short walk. DiDi ~15 min, ~¥28. Metro direct; DiDi slightly faster.

sz-zhongshuge.commute: One transfer: Line 12 to 灵芝, change Line 5 to 临海, ~40 min. DiDi ~13 km, 22-28 min, ¥42-52. Recommend DiDi.

sz-upperhills.commute: Metro ~55 min: Line 2 (Sea World) → Line 10 at 岗厦北 → 冬瓜岭, ~500 m walk. DiDi ~38 min, ¥70. DiDi simpler; metro beats traffic.

sz-hongqiao-park.commute: Metro ~115 min (Line 2 → 4 → 6 → 6-branch to 虹桥公园). DiDi ~50 min, ¥120. Recommend DiDi (much faster).

sz-culture-square.commute: Line 2 from Sea World to 登良, ~10 min, then ~800 m walk. DiDi ~18 min, ~¥30. DiDi recommended (nearest station is Line 13 人才公园).

sz-ah-ma-handmade.commute: One transfer: Line 12 to 桃园, change Line 1 to 高新园 (~480 m walk), ~35 min. DiDi ~22 min, ~¥35. DiDi recommended.

sz-spring-patio.commute: One transfer: Line 12 to 桃园, change Line 1 to 高新园/深大, ~32 min. DiDi ~8 km, 16-20 min, ¥28-35. Recommend DiDi.

sz-bay-chef-fei.commute: Metro ~58 min: Line 2 → Line 10 at 岗厦北 → 冬瓜岭, ~600 m walk to the Mandarin Oriental. DiDi ~38 min, ¥70. DiDi recommended.

sz-shieyuan.commute: One transfer: Line 12 to 桃园, change Line 1 to 高新园 (~480 m walk), ~35 min. DiDi ~22 min, ~¥35. DiDi recommended.

sz-gif-coffee.commute: Metro ~65 min: Line 2 → Line 7 at 华强北 → 八卦岭. DiDi ~38 min, ¥70. DiDi is faster here.

sz-maya-beach.commute: Direct Line 2 ride: Sea World to 世界之窗, then ~8 min walk to Happy Valley/Maya, ~30 min. DiDi ~10 km, 18-22 min, ¥32-40. Recommend metro.

sz-dameisha.commute: Metro Line 2 runs through to Line 8 with no transfer, straight to Dameisha (~58 min), then 5 min walk; ~70 min door to door. DiDi ~50 km, 55-70 min, ¥130-160. The direct metro is easiest, and beats driving on summer weekends.

sz-guanlan-shanshui.commute: Metro ~125 min (Line 2 → Line 4 at 市民中心, then bus M258 from 牛湖). DiDi ~65 min, ¥150. Recommend DiDi (metro too slow).

sz-xinggaodu.commute: Metro ~100 min (2 transfers: Line 2 → Line 10 at 岗厦北 → Line 5 at 五和, to 坂田). DiDi ~50 min, ¥95. Recommend DiDi (faster, fewer changes).

sz-haibei-bay.commute: Transit is very long (~2.5-3h via Line 2/8 to Xiaomeisha terminus, then bus or DiDi to Nan'ao). Best by car/DiDi: ~65 km, 80-95 min, ¥180-230. Dapeng needs a holiday-weekend entry reservation.

sz-aqila-spa.commute: Direct: Line 12 from Sea World to 桃园, ~12 min (+6 min walk). DiDi ~15 min, ~¥25. The spa also runs a free Shenzhen Bay Port shuttle.

sz-24histories-academy.commute: Metro ~100 min, ¥9 (Line 2 → Line 10 at 岗厦北, to 甘坑). DiDi ~50 min, ¥100. Recommend metro (cheap, one transfer).

gm-cafe-de-coral.commute: Ferry is best: 5 min to Shekou Cruise Center, immigration, ~30 min ferry to TST, then MTR 2 stops to Admiralty; ~1.75h. Land via Shenzhen Bay Port is far slower.

gm-bird-market.commute: Ferry is best (Kowloon): 5 min to Shekou Cruise Center, ~30 min ferry to TST, MTR to Prince Edward, 5 min walk; ~1.5h.

gm-cat-street.commute: Ferry is best: ~30 min ferry to TST, then MTR to Sheung Wan, short walk; ~2h. Land via Shenzhen Bay Port ~2.5h+.

gm-ssp-toy-street.commute: Ferry is best (Kowloon): ~30 min ferry to TST, MTR to Sham Shui Po (Fuk Wing St); ~1.5h.

gm-graham-market.commute: Ferry is best: ~30 min ferry to TST, MTR to Central, 5 min walk uphill; ~1.75h.

gm-wanchai-toy-street.commute: Ferry is best: ~30 min ferry to TST, MTR to Wan Chai (Tai Yuen St); ~2h.

gm-hk-maritime.commute: Ferry is best: ~30 min ferry to TST, then Star Ferry to Central Pier 7 (museum is at Pier 8 next door); ~1.75h.

gm-hk-zoo-botanical.commute: Ferry is best: ~30 min ferry to TST, MTR to Central, then taxi or 15 min walk uphill to the gardens; ~2h.

sz-miniso-cocopark.commute: Metro ~50 min: Line 2 (Sea World) → Line 1 at 世界之窗 → 购物公园 (exits into COCO Park). DiDi ~35 min, ¥65. Comparable; metro is steadier in Shennan traffic.

sz-lego-cocopark.commute: Metro ~50 min: Line 2 (Sea World) → Line 1 at 世界之窗 → 购物公园 (exits into COCO Park). DiDi ~35 min, ¥65. Comparable; metro is steadier in traffic.

sz-nantou-1820.commute: Direct: Line 12 from Sea World to 南头古城, ~15 min ride (+6 min walk). DiDi ~18 min, ~¥28. Metro direct, recommended.

sz-xili-fruit-farm.commute: Metro ~75 min (Line 2 → Line 7 at 安托山, to 茶光) + 10 min bus/taxi. DiDi ~30 min, ¥65 door to door. Recommend DiDi (skips the last mile).

sz-one-avenue.commute: Metro ~52 min: Line 2 direct (Sea World) → 岗厦北, ~600 m walk to 卓悦中心. DiDi ~35 min, ¥65. One-seat metro is easiest.

sz-safari-park.commute: Metro ~65 min, ¥7 (Line 2 → Line 7 at 安托山, to 西丽湖 exit B, 500 m to gate). DiDi ~30 min, ¥65. Metro is cheap and drops at the entrance.

sz-splendid-china.commute: Direct Line 2 ride: Sea World to 世界之窗, no transfer (~9 stops, ~30 min incl walk). DiDi ~9 km, 18-22 min, ¥30-38. Recommend metro (direct, cheap).

sz-happy-harbour.commute: One transfer: Line 12 to 灵芝, change Line 5 to 临海 (Bay Glory wheel), ~40 min. DiDi ~13 km, 22-28 min, ¥40-52. Recommend DiDi.

sz-mocape.wechat: 深圳市当代艺术与城市规划馆
sz-mocape.commute: Metro ~52 min: Line 2 direct (Sea World) → 市民中心, exit toward 少年宫, ~5 min walk. DiDi ~40 min, ¥65. One-seat metro preferred.

sz-dafen.commute: Metro ~100 min, ¥9 (Line 2 → Line 3 at 福田, to 大芬). DiDi ~45 min, ¥90. Recommend metro (cheap, one transfer).

sz-seaworld-cac.commute: ~7 min walk, on the Sea World waterfront.

sz-art-museum-new.commute: Metro ~80 min: Line 2 → Line 4 at 市民中心 → 红山 (exit A1, 300 m). Far in Longhua. DiDi ~45 min, ¥100. DiDi strongly recommended.

sz-he-xiangning.commute: One transfer: Line 2 to 世界之窗, change Line 1 to 华侨城 (1 stop), ~33 min. DiDi ~9 km, 18-22 min, ¥30-38. DiDi a bit faster.

sz-guan-shanyue.commute: Metro ~58 min: Line 2 → Line 4 at 市民中心 → 少年宫, ~8 min walk. DiDi ~40 min, ¥65. Comparable; DiDi if rushed.

sz-museum-history.commute: Metro ~50 min: Line 2 direct (Sea World) → 市民中心; the museum is in the Civic Center building. DiDi ~40 min, ¥65. Take the one-seat Line 2.

sz-eslite-mixcworld.commute: One transfer: Line 12 to 桃园, change Line 1 to 高新园 (~480 m walk), ~35 min. DiDi ~22 min, ~¥35. DiDi recommended.

sz-central-book-city.commute: Metro ~55 min: Line 2 direct (Sea World) → 市民中心, ~10 min walk to 中心书城. DiDi ~40 min, ¥65. One-seat metro, comparable.

sz-haidilao-1.commute: Direct: Line 2 from Sea World to 后海, ~12 min ride (+6 min walk). DiDi ~15 min, ~¥25. Metro direct and easy; DiDi if in a hurry.

sz-haidilao-2.commute: Direct: Line 2 from Sea World to 后海 (汉京中心 nearby), ~12 min (+6 min walk). DiDi ~15 min, ~¥25. Metro direct, recommended.

sz-seaworld-fountain.commute: ~6 min walk to the Sea World plaza.

sz-jiaochangwei.commute: Transit ~2.5-3h (Line 2/8 to Xiaomeisha + bus/DiDi). Best by DiDi or chartered car: ~60 km, 70-85 min, ¥160-200. Holiday weekends need a Dapeng entry reservation.

sz-dapeng-fortress.commute: Transit ~2.5-3h (Line 3 to Shuanglong + bus 818 + M471, or Line 2/8 to Xiaomeisha + DiDi). Best by car/DiDi: ~60 km, 70-85 min, ¥160-200. 2 km from Jiaochangwei beach.

sz-xichong.commute: Transit ~3-3.5h. Best self-drive or charter: ~70 km, 95-110 min, ¥220-280. Holiday weekends need an entry reservation; park at the Xichong lot and take the shuttle up.

sz-dongmen-street-food.commute: Metro ~62 min: Line 2 direct (Sea World) → 湖贝, ~6 min walk to 东门老街. DiDi ~45 min, ¥85. DiDi if traffic is light.

sz-sushiro-1.commute: Direct: Line 2 from Sea World to 后海 (海岸城 sits atop the station), ~12 min (+6 min walk). DiDi ~15 min, ~¥25. Metro direct, recommended.

sz-yuan-gu.commute: One transfer: Line 12 to 桃园, change Line 1 to 高新园 (~480 m walk), ~35 min. DiDi ~22 min, ~¥35. DiDi recommended.

sz-baoan-hunan-noodle.commute: One transfer: Line 12 to 灵芝, change Line 5 to 临海, ~40 min. DiDi ~13 km, 22-28 min, ¥40-52. Recommend DiDi (much faster).
